final:
// // This mux selects 'b' when 'sel_a' is high and either 'sel_b1' or 'sel_b2' is high
module top_module(
  input a,
  input b,
  input sel_a,
  input sel_b1,
  input sel_b2,
  output reg out_mux
);always @(*) begin
    if (sel_a) begin
      out_mux = a;
    end
    else if (!sel_b1 && !sel_b2) begin
      out_mux = b;
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This mux selects 'b' when 'sel_a' is high and either 'sel_b1' or 'sel_b2' is high
